caption: The video appears to be a live broadcast of "The Tiger Technicians Hour," featuring Basil Chapman on June 8th, 2022. The first frame shows a panel discussion with five men, each in their own video feed, suggesting a virtual meeting or webinar format. The text indicates that viewers can call in live on-air, providing contact numbers for both domestic and international callers. The second frame transitions to an advertisement for TFNN (Trading Financial News Network), emphasizing its role in educating investors with live trading education every market day from Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 4 pm. The consistent branding and professional setup suggest this is part of a structured financial education program aimed at traders and investors.
